title: bstack setpoint v1
description: Schema for a single setpoint declared in .control/policy.yaml. Setpoints are target values + alert bands the substrate measures via scripts/metrics/measure-S<n>.sh.

target.description: Desired value. Null when target is per-plant or unset.

alert_below.description: Threshold: value < alert_below triggers an alert at this setpoint's severity.

alert_above.description: Threshold: value > alert_above triggers an alert at this setpoint's severity.

anyOf.description: Human-readable description of how to measure (legacy free-form).

spec.description: Command line, function name, file path, or otel metric.

severity.description: blocking: out-of-target violations block work. informational (alias `warn`): surface but do not block. advisory (alias `soft`): agent guidance only. `warn` and `soft` are v1-era synonyms preserved for backward compat; canonical names will be enforced in schema v2.

owner.description: Who is responsible for restoring the setpoint when it drifts.

introduced_in.description: bstack version that introduced this setpoint.

deprecated_in.description: bstack version that deprecated this setpoint (if any).
